mapper.select: SELECT #{campaignId} AS campaignId, COUNT(*) AS totalRequestCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SENT') AS sentCount, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'DEAD') AS deadCount, MIN(created_at) AS processingStartedAt, MAX(updated_at) AS processingFinishedAt FROM notification_request WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_campaign_summary ( campaign_id, total_request_count, total_attempt_count, sent_count, dead_count, processing_started_at, processing_finished_at, duration_seconds ) VALUES ( #{campaignId}, #{totalRequestCount}, #{totalAttemptCount}, #{sentCount}, #{deadCount}, #{processingStartedAt}, #{processingFinishedAt}, #{durationSeconds} )
mapper.select: SELECT summary_id AS summaryId, campaign_id AS campaignId, total_request_count AS totalRequestCount, total_attempt_count AS totalAttemptCount, sent_count AS sentCount, dead_count AS deadCount, processing_started_at AS processingStartedAt, processing_finished_at AS processingFinishedAt, duration_seconds AS durationSeconds FROM notification_campaign_summary WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId}

SELECT summary_id AS summaryId, campaign_id AS campaignId, total_request_count AS totalRequestCount, total_attempt_count AS totalAttemptCount, sent_count AS sentCount, dead_count AS deadCount, processing_started_at AS processingStartedAt, processing_finished_at AS processingFinishedAt, duration_seconds AS durationSeconds FROM notification_campaign_summary ORDER BY summary_id DESC
